message.content:
{
  "processingState": {
    "processed": 1,

    "currentWorkId": "work_chn_1919_001",

  },
  "items": [
    {
      "basic": {
        "name": "减租会",
        "type": "PAINTING",
        "countryName": "中国",
        "year": 1943,
        "ontologyVersion": "v1.0",
        "promptVersion": "CPR-1.2",
        "annotationModelVersion": "GPT-4o",
        "generatorDate": "2025-03-12",
        "annotationLanguage": "zh-CN",
        "evidenceVersion": "v1.0",
        "confidence": 0.85,
        "primaryMediaType": "PAINTING"
      },
      "semantic": {
        "summary": "古元于1943年创作的延安时期木刻版画，以刚劲有力的黑白刀法展现边区农民群体与地主围绕减租政策展开说理斗争的戏剧性场景。人物姿态与表情富于典型性，构图将对立双方置于同一空间，形成强烈的视觉张力。作品将革命政策宣传与民间审美融合，成为延安木刻运动中表现农民阶级意识觉醒的代表性图像文献。",
        "themes": [
          "阶级斗争",
          "社会变革",
          "农民解放",
          "集体力量",
          "公平正义"
        ],
        "keywords": [
          "延安木刻",
          "减租减息",
          "农民",
          "地主",
          "说理斗争",
          "边区",
          "古元",
          "黑白版画",
          "群众运动",
          "土地政策"
        ],
        "core_experience": "在质朴而充满力量的黑白画面中，观众感受到底层农民群体面对压迫时的觉醒与抗争，体验一种由集体行动推动社会不公被打破的庄重而激昂的历史在场感。",
        "experience_introduction": "《减租会》通过版画特有的刚劲线条和强烈黑白对比，将边区农民与地主说理斗争的瞬间凝固于画面。观众在观看时，首先被人物群体的动势和紧绷的构图关系所吸引，进而通过各个人物鲜明的姿态与表情辨识出冲突的双方。质朴的刀法减弱了装饰性，强化了现场的真实感和严肃性，使观众体验到一种朴素而坚定的正义力量，以及社会秩序正在发生根本转变的时代氛围。"
      },
      "experience_vector": {
        "passion": 0.65,
        "healing": 0.1,
        "awe": 0.25,
        "nostalgia": 0.15,
        "reflection": 0.6,
        "romance": 0.0,
        "tension": 0.7,
        "warmth": 0.2,
        "loneliness": 0.1,
        "hope": 0.55
      },
      "psychology_vector": {
        "cognitive": {
          "abstractness": 0.45,
          "complexity": 0.5,
          "depth_of_thought": 0.55,
          "logical_structure": 0.4,
          "novelty": 0.5,
          "exploration": 0.3,
          "ambiguity": 0.1,
          "predictability": 0.6,
          "information_density": 0.55,
          "learning_value": 0.7
        },
        "worldview": {
          "personal_scale": 0.3,
          "relationship_scale": 0.65,
          "social_scale": 0.85,
          "civilization_scale": 0.2,
          "cosmic_scale": 0.0,
          "time_span": 0.25,
          "fantasy_level": 0.0
        },
        "emotion": {
          "happiness": 0.2,
          "sadness": 0.25,
          "loneliness": 0.05,
          "warmth": 0.2,
          "fear": 0.15,
          "tension": 0.8,
          "awe": 0.3,
          "nostalgia": 0.15,
          "hope": 0.5,
          "melancholy": 0.2,
          "anger": 0.6,
          "peace": 0.1
        },
        "aesthetic": {
          "beauty": 0.35,
          "minimalism": 0.7,
          "luxury": 0.0,
          "darkness": 0.5,
          "brightness": 0.4,
          "dreamlike": 0.0,
          "mystery": 0.05,
          "experimental": 0.4,
          "classical": 0.3,
          "modern": 0.55
        },
        "narrative": {
          "plot_complexity": 0.3,
          "character_depth": 0.4,
          "character_growth": 0.35,
          "world_building": 0.2,
          "nonlinear_structure": 0.0,
          "slow_immersion": 0.2,
          "action_intensity": 0.6,
          "conflict_intensity": 0.85,
          "philosophical_depth": 0.45
        },
        "social_relationship": {
          "individualism": 0.2,
          "collectivism": 0.9,
          "family": 0.15,
          "friendship": 0.2,
          "love": 0.0,
          "community": 0.8,
          "competition": 0.75,
          "cooperation": 0.7,
          "power_relationship": 0.9,
          "identity": 0.6
        },
        "value": {
          "freedom": 0.6,
          "order": 0.5,
          "truth": 0.45,
          "beauty": 0.25,
          "achievement": 0.55,
          "justice": 0.85,
          "sacrifice": 0.4,
          "self_exploration": 0.15,
          "tradition": 0.2,
          "change": 0.8,
          "survival": 0.5,
          "meaning": 0.45
        },
        "behavior": {
          "curiosity": 0.2,
          "creation": 0.35,
          "adventure": 0.2,
          "reflection": 0.55,
          "competition": 0.8,
          "social": 0.85,
          "discipline": 0.5,
          "risk": 0.5,
          "calm": 0.2,
          "escape": 0.0
        },
        "sensory": {
          "visual_intensity": 0.75,
          "color_richness": 0.1,
          "sound_intensity": 0.0,
          "rhythm_energy": 0.6,
          "atmosphere": 0.7,
          "immersion": 0.45
        }
      },
      "media_vector": {
        "painting_vector": {
          "visual_style": "黑白木刻版画",
          "color_expression": 0.1,
          "composition_complexity": 0.65,
          "symbolism": 0.55,
          "emotional_expression": 0.75,
          "historical_style": 0.8
        }
      },
      "vector_facts": [
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.passion", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "画面中农民群体的动势和斗争姿态传达出强烈的情感投入。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.healing", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "主题聚焦于社会冲突而非安抚，整体不提供疗愈体验。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.awe", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "虽有集体行动的庄重感，但画面风格质朴，不刻意营造崇高敬畏。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.nostalgia", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "作为历史图像唤起特定时代记忆，但怀旧并非主要体验。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.reflection", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "作品引导观众思考社会变革与阶级关系的本质。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.romance", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "无任何浪漫元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.tension", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "对立双方的直接对峙构成画面核心张力。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.warmth", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "农民之间的团结稍带温暖感，但整体氛围被冲突主导。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.loneliness", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "作品描绘的是集体行动，孤独感极弱。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.hope", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "减租说理的胜利前景赋予观众对公平未来的希望。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "形式写实直白，但主题本身具有抽象的社会结构含义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.complexity", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "社会矛盾和人物关系具有适度复杂性，但表达直接。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.depth_of_thought", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "引发对阶级制度和土地关系的深入思考。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.logical_structure", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "画面按照冲突双方进行空间组织，具有直观的逻辑。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.novelty", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "在创作年代，将革命主题与民间木刻形式结合具有一定新意。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.exploration", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "呈现的是特定社会场景，不直接鼓励对未知领域的探索。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.ambiguity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "立场鲜明，善恶清晰，几乎没有歧义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.predictability", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "叙事指向明确，观众较易预见斗争的发展方向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.information_density", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "单幅画面浓缩了时代政策、阶级关系和人物典型特征。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.learning_value", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "是了解延安时期社会政策与美术运动的重要视觉文献。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.personal_scale", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "主题集中于社会群体，个人内心世界的表达较弱。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.relationship_scale", "score": 0.65, "explanation": "农民与地主、农民内部的关系是画面的核心构成。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.social_scale", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "直接表现宏观社会制度和阶级对立的变革。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.civilization_scale", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "聚焦于特定历史时期的局部社会，未扩展至文明层面。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.cosmic_scale", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "毫无宇宙尺度的表达。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.time_span", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "展示的是历史进程中的一个决定性瞬间。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.fantasy_level", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "完全基于现实社会场景。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.happiness", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "严肃的斗争氛围压抑了喜悦之情。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.sadness", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "底层农民的苦难隐含其中，但悲伤并非主要情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.loneliness", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "集体行动的场景排斥孤独感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.warmth", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "团结互助稍带暖意，但不显著。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.fear", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "对抗中有潜在恐惧，但被激昂斗志覆盖。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.tension", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "阶级对立双方的直接冲突使紧张感贯穿画面。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.awe", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "人民觉醒场面具有历史厚重感，但以质朴手法冲淡了崇高感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.nostalgia", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "特定时期风貌会引起些许怀旧，但非核心情感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.hope", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "斗争指向光明的结果，蕴含对新社会的希望。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.melancholy", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "苦难年代气息带来微弱的忧郁感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.anger", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "对压迫者的愤怒是推动斗争的强烈情绪来源。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.peace", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "冲突主题使得宁静感几乎不存在。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.beauty", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "版画线条力度美和构图秩序感具有特定美感，但不追求唯美。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.minimalism", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "黑白对比、质朴刀法、去装饰化特征明显。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.luxury", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "题材与技法均无奢华元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.darkness", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "大面积黑色刀痕和沉重主题赋予画面沉郁基调。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.brightness", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "白色区域的运用和革命主题又带来一定明亮感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.dreamlike", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "写实风格和斗争主题完全排除了梦幻感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.mystery", "score": 0.05, "explanation": "一切矛盾都公开摆在明面，毫无神秘感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.experimental", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "在时代背景下将传统木刻用于革命宣传具有一定实验性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.classical", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "吸收了民间木刻传统，但服务于现代内容。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.modern", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "内容紧扣现代社会变革，形式已脱离传统文人画体系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.plot_complexity", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "单幅静止画面仅能暗示情节冲突，不具备复杂叙事线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_depth", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "人物具有典型性但缺乏深入个体心理刻画。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_growth", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "暗示了阶级意识觉醒，但无法完整展现成长弧。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.world_building", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "仅提供一个特定场景，未展开宏大世界建构。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.nonlinear_structure", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "视觉呈现遵循事件的时空逻辑。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.slow_immersion", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "信息直接，不需要长时间沉浸。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.action_intensity", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "人物动势、手势和表情构成视觉上的强烈“行动”感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.conflict_intensity", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "减租说理是直接的利益与权力对抗，冲突强度极高。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.philosophical_depth", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "触及了剥削与反抗的根本社会矛盾，但表达较为直白。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.individualism", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "个人价值完全融入阶级集体叙事中。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.collectivism", "score": 0.9, "explanation": "农民群体团结一致对抗地主的场景是集体主义的极致表现。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.family", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "未强调家庭内部关系，关注的是阶级情感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.friendship", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "阶级情谊中包含了友谊成分，但不突出。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.love", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "没有爱情元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.community", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "斗争的团结力量源于边区农民社区的紧密联系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.competition", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "农民与地主之间存在尖锐的资源与地位竞争。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.cooperation", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "农民内部高度合作，共同完成说理斗争。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.power_relationship", "score": 0.9, "explanation": "画面核心即在重构地主与农民之间的权力从属关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social_relationship.identity", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "作品清晰界定了压迫者与被压迫者的阶级身份。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.freedom", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "摆脱地租剥削是争取经济自由的第一步。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.order", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "通过政策说理手段建立新的社会秩序。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.truth", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "旨在揭示剥削关系的真相。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.beauty", "score": 0.25, "explanation": "艺术为政治服务，纯粹审美追求让位于宣教功能。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.achievement", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "成功减租是农民集体斗争的巨大成就。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.justice", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "作品的核心驱动力就是实现社会公平与正义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.sacrifice", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "抗争过程中隐含着牺牲精神。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.self_exploration", "score": 0.15, "explanation": "关注外部社会问题，非内心探索。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.tradition", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "直接冲击传统的土地剥削制度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.change", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "推动社会制度根本性变革是作品的最高目标。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.survival", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "减租直接关系到农民的基本生存保障。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.meaning", "score": 0.45, "explanation": "赋予农民斗争以解放的崇高意义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.curiosity", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "知识普及和政策解读驱动，但非对未知的好奇。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.creation", "score": 0.35, "explanation": "艺术创作服务于现实斗争，本身具有创造性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.adventure", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "革命斗争带有冒险性，但作品并未强调冒险色彩。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.reflection", "score": 0.55, "explanation": "促使观众反思社会不公的根源。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.competition", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "阶级斗争本身就是最激烈的对抗性竞争。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.social", "score": 0.85, "explanation": "高度鼓励社会动员和群众参与行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.discipline", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "有组织的说理斗争需要纪律性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.risk", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "挑战地主权威具有一定风险，但画面氛围显示农民占据优势。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.calm", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "情绪激昂，偏离了冷静沉着的行为状态。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.escape", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "直面冲突，没有丝毫逃避的倾向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.visual_intensity", "score": 0.75, "explanation": "黑白木刻的刚硬线条和强对比具有强烈视觉冲击力。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.color_richness", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "仅限于黑白色调，无色彩丰富度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.sound_intensity", "score": 0.0, "explanation": "作为静态绘画无听觉感知。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.rhythm_energy", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "刀法和黑白布局形成了画面节奏感和内在能量。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.atmosphere", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "木刻的特殊质感营造出浓郁的乡土斗争氛围。" },
